prompt: Implement the fixed-storage generic min-heap API in min_heap.c. Elements are opaque fixed-size byte records ordered by the caller comparator. Implement init, push, peek, pop, remove by zero-based heap-array index, and find. Push and removal must preserve heap order in O(log n); find may be O(n). Return -1 when full, false for invalid removal or empty pop, and never allocate memory. Preserve the API in min_heap.h and correctly support element sizes that are not machine-word sized.
instruction: Complete min_heap.c as a portable Zephyr-style fixed-storage heap.
